case_title: PAULA DE VOS VS. BRYAN G. HUNT ET AL

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (FEE FOR SERVICE: $59.00) SERVED MAY-15-2008, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LIDDELL, JENNA R. (HUNT)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-28-2018 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO SEP-05-2018 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DE VOS, PAULA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HUNT, BRYAN G. LIDDELL, JENNA R. (HUNT) $3,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $203.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,203.00, THE PHOTOGRAPHIC EVIDENCE SHOWS THAT MS. LIDDELL BACKED INTO MS. DE VOS'S CAR AT AN ANGLE. THE COURT AWARDS THE MARKET VALUE OF THE PLAINTIFF'S CAR, WHICH IS LESS THAN THE COST OF REPAIR. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO ENTER SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CCP. 116.850 - GRANTED FILED BY DEFENDANT HUNT, BRYAN G. LIDDELL, JENNA R. (HUNT)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (FEE FOR SERVICE: $69.00) SERVED MAY-12-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HUNT, BRYAN G.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-05-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-05-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. 506 PLAINTIFF PAULA DE VOS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BRYANT G. HUNT IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY JENNA LIDDELL, SPOUSE. DEFENDANT JENNA LIDDELL IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
